regression: The v0.1.12 shared-project browser was reachable only when activeProjectId was null, but the product exposed no transition to that state after a project existed.

fix.control: Always-visible Browse shared projects sidebar action
fix.stateTransition: activeProjectId becomes null and view becomes workspace
fix.preservation: Existing projects and their archive state remain unchanged
fix.statusCorrection: MCP app inspection now reports Drive-backed project sharing as available

requiredEvidence: production frontend and Tauri builds must pass
packaged two-install join remains the decisive physical gate
